Skip to contents
HubbellGLM 1.0.0
    • Getting started with HubbellGLM: the Barro Colorado Island dataset
  • Reference

Package index

Main fitting function

HubbellGLM()
Hubbell regression This function mimics the GLM structure. We do so to avoid conflicts with the current glm implementation (if it gets updated)
estimate_sigma()
Estimate the sigma parameter for a HubbellGLM model via BIC minimisation
step(<hubbell>)
Stepwise model selection for HubbellGLM models

Prediction

predict_curve()
Predict the accumulation curve from a HubbellGLM model for new observations.

Inference

summary(<HubbellGLM>)
Summary function for the HubbellGLM method
vcov_shared()
Variance-covariance matrix for a HubbellGLM fit, optionally adjusted for shared observations via a sandwich estimator.

Family objects

hubbell()
Hubbell family of genetalized linear models
quasihubbell()
Quasi-Hubbell family of generalized linear models

Link and distribution functions

make.link.hubbell()
Link function for the Hubbell generalized linear model
inv_polyseries()
Function to invert the polyseries
mean_dirichlet_process()
Mean of the n. of species from Dirichlet process
deriv_dirichlet_process()
Derivative of the mean of the Dirichlet process distribution
inv_mean_dirichlet_process()
Invert the mean of the Dirichlet process distribution
rDPspecies()
Simulate the number of distinct species from a Dirichlet process

Data

BarroColorado
Barro Colorado Island subplot data

On this page
